meta.name: lince-pi-paranoid
meta.description: Pi paranoid: only LLM providers known to nono's credential proxy (anthropic, openai, gemini) are reachable; ~/.pi is isolated to a per-agent scratch HOME. Pi supports 18+ providers but only the three above ship with credential injection — for the others (mistral, groq, deepseek, cerebras, openrouter, AWS Bedrock, ...) ship a custom level fragment that extends `network.allow_domain`. environment.passthrough below is intentionally narrow: only the providers covered by credential injection cross into the sandbox.
